'''Brelor''' was a moon of the planet [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]]. It was given by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] as a retirement home, even as the Empire's [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR]] intelligence organization tried to assassinate him. Jan was alerted ahead of time by [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]. He escaped the attempt on his life. Jan and his son [[Vrad Dodonna]] both joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

{{Moon-stub}}
